human_verification.notes: Verified customer platform support boundaries, source coverage, service-resolution workflow, confidentiality and approval handling, content-workflow caveats, and scenario-to-ability mappings for the validated spec pack.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit service-resolution, customer communication, refusal, and escalation behavior.
Required abilities across shared, service-support-and-resolution, and professional-and-information-services sets are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Evidence-backed customer platform support is constrained to tenant support scope, subscriptions, entitlements, CRM/ticket records, product and content records, approved runbooks, incident facts, and communication logs.
Confidentiality, unsupported exception, repeat-failure, policy conflict, content workflow, and approval-conflict behavior is explicit and routed to the correct adjacent owners.

Legal, editorial, copyright, privacy, security incident, engineering, product-roadmap, billing, contractual, and professional-judgment boundaries trigger escalation instead of overconfident support closure.
Runtime remains specification-based, with no retained-implementation runtime claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains because tenant-specific approval thresholds, jurisdictional rules, and routing choices are converted into explicit runtime prerequisites and escalation requirements.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment and future promotion to a retained-implementation package if demand justifies it.
